command:
git checkout --theirs install.ps1 tests/adapters-windows.Tests.ps1 .gitban/agents/executor/logs/SMARTPACKDEBT-inexon-executor-2.jsonl && git add install.ps1 tests/adapters-windows.Tests.ps1 .gitban/agents/executor/logs/SMARTPACKDEBT-inexon-executor-2.jsonl && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: merge inexon rework (executor-2, all 6 blockers resolved)

Takes worktree version which includes cherry-picked exg19y/ji2847
changes plus full inexon rework with restored path_rules engine,
Get-ActivePack helper, and functional E2E tests.
EOF
)"
git worktree remove --force "C:\Users\Cameron\Projects\peon-ping\.claude\worktrees\agent-a23356ca" && git branch -D worktree-agent-a23356ca && git worktree prune

export AGENT_LOG_DIR=".gitban/agents/reviewer/logs" && export AGENT_ROLE="reviewer" && export AGENT_SPRINT_TAG="SMARTPACKDEBT" && export AGENT_CARD_ID="inexon" && export AGENT_CYCLE="2" && source scripts/agent-log.sh && agent_log_init 2>&1 || echo "profiling init skipped"

cd "C:/Users/Cameron/Projects/peon-ping" && git add .gitban/agents/reviewer/inbox/SMARTPACKDEBT-inexon-reviewer-2.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: review-2 APPROVAL for inexon (bind/unbind CLI quality)

All 6 blockers from review-1 resolved. Three backlog items noted:
missing --install E2E test, lost registry field fallbacks, help
text alignment regression.
EOF
)"
